title: umbra-py error object
description: The single JSON object umbra-py prints to stderr when a command fails and machine-readable errors are active (the invocation used --json, or UMBRA_JSON is set). Produced by umbra_py.UmbraError.to_dict(). Stable within a minor version.

error.description: The exception class name (e.g. "CatalogError", "MissingDependencyError"). Stable identifier a caller can branch on without parsing the message.

message.description: Human-readable summary of what went wrong.

hint.description: A single actionable recovery step (an install command, an alternative flag), or null when none applies.
